description: Per-shot storyboard with visual translation ladder. The why_this_visual field is the most important — if you can't write a compelling answer, don't render.
title: Film Title
visual_thesis_summary: One sentence: what is this film's complete visual arc?

shots.spoken_passage: The exact sentence or passage spoken during this shot.

transformation.subject: X
transformation.the_claim: One sentence: what is this shot asserting at the level of meaning?

visual_translation_ladder.proposition: What the sentence means at the level of ideas
visual_translation_ladder.relation: What logical relation this enacts (causation, identity, correspondence, emanation, contrast, recursion, recognition, etc.)
visual_translation_ladder.process: The actual transformation in abstract terms (e.g., 'convergence of two distinct forces into one field')
visual_translation_ladder.material_metaphor: The physical/material process that embodies this transformation (e.g., 'two rivers meeting, their currents interlocking')
visual_translation_ladder.motion: The specific motion or animation that makes the relationship legible (e.g., 'two streams flow toward each other, their leading edges merge, then the combined stream continues')
visual_translation_ladder.resolved_image: Exactly what the viewer sees at the end of this shot. Describe the frame.

visual_design.what_viewer_sees: Describe the literal visual in one sentence.
visual_design.why_this_visual: THE KEY FIELD. Explain WHY this visual matches these words. What transformation does the visual enact that corresponds to the transformation the sentence asserts?
visual_design.continuity_in: What visual element enters from the previous shot
visual_design.continuity_out: What visual element persists into the next shot
visual_design.secondary_operator: optional — only if two motions happen
forbidden: things NOT to show in this shot

self_critique.bad_first_visual: What would a lazy illustrator make for this passage? Be brutally honest.
self_critique.rejected_because: Why that lazy visual fails the transformation test
self_critique.no_narration_test: PASS or FAIL — if muted, would a viewer understand the concept from the visual alone?
self_critique.still_frame_test: PASS or FAIL — would you be embarrassed to show the mature frame as a still?
